message:
fix(fcp-protocol): verify session ack binds to hello endpoints and offered suites

MeshSessionAck::verify() now rejects acks where from/to fields don't
mirror the hello or the selected cipher suite wasn't among those offered,
closing a session hijack and cipher-suite downgrade vector.

- Add AckHelloMismatch error variant for endpoint binding check
- Add AckSuiteNotOffered error variant for suite downgrade check
- Two new tests: ack_verify_rejects_endpoint_mismatch and
  ack_verify_rejects_suite_not_offered_by_hello
- Display-string assertions for new error variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
